fields.summary: Create common ResourceUsage class to track labeled resource usages in Capacity Scheduler
(Clone of YARN-796) Allow for (admin) labels on nodes and resource-requests

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A task that needs to be done.
issuetype.name: Task

fields.description:
Since we have labels on nodes, so we need to track resource usage *by labels*, includes
- AM resource (to enforce max-am-resource-by-label after YARN-2637)
- Used resource (includes AM resource usage)
- Reserved resource
- Pending resource
- Headroom

Benefits to have such a common class are:
- Reuse lots of code in different places (Queue/App/User), better maintainability and readability.
- Can make fine-grained locking (e.g. accessing used resource in a queue doesn't need lock a queue)

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: Capacity Scheduler LeafQueue/ParentQueue should use ResourceUsage to track used-resources-by-label.

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are not closed can be reopened.
status.name: Closed
